notes: Tier list reflects high-ELO competitive play (Diamond+). Solo-queue viability may differ.

economy.notes: Full buy: Phantom/Vandal (2900) + Heavy Armor (1000) + signature ability. Half buy: Spectre (1600) + Heavy Armor (1000) or light armor + cheap abilities. Eco/save: pistol only, save credits for next round.

Ascent.notes: Jett Op on A Catwalk is a must-defend angle. Killjoy Lockdown retakes B through Mid Market. Sova Recon lineups into A Wine and B Main are critical.

Bind.notes: Viper Toxic Screen splits A Long. Teleporters require denial (cage/slow in the tube). No mid means utility usage is heavily site-specific.

Haven.notes: Omen is the default controller: 3 smokes can cover Mid Doors + one site simultaneously. Sage C Long wall on defense is a time-buy. Killjoy holds B or C retake. B Mid is the cheapest site entry — smoke B Window and push.

Icebox.notes: Viper Pit on A or B site is map-defining post-plant. B Tube with Jett Updraft elevation is the most effective aggressive peek. Sova drone through B Tube is a classic opener.

Lotus.notes: Rotating doors create audio tells — time rotations around door sounds. Breach Rolling Thunder on B Halls is nearly unavoidable. Viper Pit on A or C locks out retakes.

Pearl.notes: Mid control determines the round. Op at Mid Top with Chamber or Jett is high-value. Cypher cam through A Art is consistent intel.

Split.notes: Sage Barrier on A Ramps or B Main is the highest-value single ability in the game here. Defender-sided: winning Heaven on both sites is the meta. Rush strategies are rare — default to slow setups.

Sunset.notes: B Lane is a long-range Op corridor. A Bridge elevation enables aggressive Jett peeks. Omen smokes Mid Market to cut rotation timing.

Abyss.notes: Edge mechanics punish aggressive crossing. Jett Tailwind dash near ledges is high risk/reward. Cypher trapwire near ledge angles forces opponents to stop and look before peeking.

Omen.reason: Dark Cover through any geometry makes him the most flexible smoke. From the Shadows teleport creates pressure on any map.

Viper.reason: Toxic Screen is the only free wall per round. Pit is the most oppressive post-plant ability in the game.

Killjoy.reason: Nanoswarm under spike is the best post-plant combo. Lockdown forces free retakes on most maps.

Jett.reason: Only duelist with Operator synergy at high level. Tailwind peek-and-retreat is unpunishable with Op.

Sova.reason: Free Recon Bolt every round. Drone + Shock Bolt lineups are map-unique advantages.

Reyna.reason: High solo-queue pick rate but team-dependent at high ELO. Leer nearsight is the cheapest hard-flash in the game.

Cypher.reason: Strongest single-site anchor. Neural Theft reveals all enemies — most information-dense ult available.

Fade.reason: Prowler hard-checks corners. Seize stops retakes. Better entry-initiator than Sova on aggressive maps.

Brimstone.reason: Most reliable 3-smoke setup with no wall-of-sight restrictions. Stim Beacon enables contact plays.

Breach.reason: Flashpoint through walls is the safest flash in the game. Rolling Thunder is the most team-fight-winning ult.

Sage.reason: Resurrection is a round-winner but Sage needs to play safely to be available for the revive. Barrier is high-value on specific maps (Split, Haven).

Chamber.reason: Post-nerf (Rendezvous range reduced). Still strong with Op but less mobile than pre-nerf. Tour de Force win conditions still exist.

Iso.reason: Kill Contract removes one enemy from the round but risks Iso too. Double Tap rewards aggressive trading. Rising in team compositions that execute fast.

KAY/O.reason: ZERO/point suppression is strongest on utility-heavy defenders (Killjoy, Cypher). Underused: R-click FLASH is the fastest pop flash available.
